creator: mjs@bur.st
text:
FrontBase is a high performance SQL92 compliant relational database available for FreeBSD, Linux, Mac and Windows.

Although this software is made available for FreeBSD at www.frontbase.com there is no way to install it using the FreeBSD packaging system.

Fix: The attached shar archive contains the necessary files to install FrontBase via the FreeBSD ports system.


Patch attached with submission follows:
